loading.title: Verifying Payment
loading.description: Please wait while we confirm your payment...

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.description: Your payment has been processed successfully

failed.title: Payment Failed
failed.description: Your payment could not be processed
failed.retryMessage: Your payment was not successful. You can retry the payment from your orders page.

cancelled.title: Payment Cancelled
cancelled.retryMessage: The payment was cancelled before completion. Your order may still be pending - you can retry the payment from your orders page.

timeout.title: Payment Verification Pending
timeout.processing: Your payment is being processed by the payment gateway. This may take a few minutes.
timeout.checkLater: Please check your orders page in a few minutes to see the updated status.
